episodes.title: First Blood
episodes.description: Detective Raines arrives at a crime scene that doesn't add up — and realizes the victim knew the killer.

episodes.title: The Witness
episodes.description: A key witness recants. Raines suspects intimidation from inside the precinct.

episodes.title: Cold Case, Hot Lead
episodes.description: A 10-year-old unsolved murder resurfaces with a fresh fingerprint match.

episodes.title: Blind Trust
episodes.description: A trusted partner is placed on administrative leave, leaving Raines to work solo.

episodes.title: The Fixer
episodes.description: Raines uncovers a city official with ties to three separate homicides.

episodes.title: Night Court
episodes.description: An emergency hearing forces Raines to testify under oath about methods that bent the rules.

episodes.title: Red Folder
episodes.description: A classified dossier surfaces — someone inside the department is feeding intel to the DA's enemies.

episodes.title: Pressure Drop
episodes.description: The case against the fixer begins to collapse as witnesses disappear one by one.

episodes.title: Final Verdict
episodes.description: Raines sets a trap, using herself as bait to draw out the last remaining conspirator.

episodes.title: Aftermath
episodes.description: The courtroom delivers a verdict that splits the city. Raines receives an unexpected assignment.

episodes.title: New Beat
episodes.description: Raines is transferred to organized crime, inheriting a case her predecessor never closed.

episodes.title: Family Business
episodes.description: The Marchetti family appears legitimate — until a body turns up in their warehouse.

episodes.title: The Cleaner
episodes.description: A professional cleaner with no digital footprint becomes the investigation's central mystery.

episodes.title: Smoke & Mirrors
episodes.description: A federal agent arrives and starts pulling strings — who does he actually work for?

episodes.title: Double Cross
episodes.description: Raines plays both sides of a negotiation to keep an informant alive.

episodes.title: The Long Game
episodes.description: It becomes clear that the Marchetti investigation has been compromised from day one.

episodes.title: Burn It Down
episodes.description: Raines goes off-book to gather evidence that no warrant would ever cover.

episodes.title: Judgment
episodes.description: A dramatic confrontation in the city's financial district brings the season to a head.

extras.title: The Making of Iron Verdict
extras.description: Writers and cast discuss the series' grounded approach to police drama.

extras.title: Deleted Scene: The Interrogation
extras.description: An extended interrogation sequence that didn't make the final cut.
